memories.summary: Retry policy for the Orion client
memories.content: The Orion client makes 4 attempts with decorrelated jitter before surfacing the final error.
Ledger cache keys use the prefix lg2: followed by the lowercase tenant UUID.
The config parser accepts schema versions 3 and 4; version 2 must fail closed.
The Atlas worker caps each tenant at 12 concurrent jobs and queues the remainder.
Migration K-417 writes the sentinel violet-heron after its backfill is complete.
Artifact Nimbus is accepted only when its manifest uses BLAKE2b-256.
Blue deployments drain for 11 minutes before old containers are terminated.
After two unanswered pages, escalation goes to the Cedar incident commander.
The Quartz database restore objective is 23 minutes from the latest verified snapshot.
The second canary step routes 17 percent of traffic for 9 minutes.
The Saffron queue is drained with the operator action quiet-saffron, never purge.
If Polar region fails, traffic moves to the Umber region before any DNS rollback.
Broker-issued Finch credentials expire after 13 minutes and cannot be renewed in place.
The Granite export requires approvals from 2 distinct operators.
A revoked Orchid grant sets rotation_needed immediately, but revocation is not retroactive.
Wren access events remain online for 184 days before archival.
The break-glass audit reason code is amber-lattice and must accompany the ticket id.
An unknown Juniper capability is denied with policy code CAP-709.
The Lumen trial permits 6 active workspaces per organization.
Bulk JSON export is available starting with the Copper plan.
The mobile client keeps an offline task cache for 36 hours.
A failed invoice has a 5-day grace period before read-only mode begins.
The Mosaic importer accepts archives whose root folder is named kiln-root.
The collaborative timeline feature ships under the codename Silver Loom.
Study Aster uses task completion rate as its primary endpoint, not retrieval precision.
The paired pilot requires at least 28 tasks before its first analysis point.
Per-category exploratory tests use the Benjamini-Yekutieli correction.
The pre-registered practical lift floor for Study Birch is 0.035.
Experiment Tern declares collapse when normalized entropy drops by more than 0.14.
The Cobalt analysis runs once after generation 8 with no interim peeking.
An obsolete prototype retried twice, used schema version 1, and had no tenant concurrency limit.
The retired runbook drained for three minutes and sent every alert to the general channel.
The superseded policy allowed one approval and retained audit rows for thirty days.
The deprecated matrix listed unlimited trials and made every export feature free.
The rejected draft treated each run as independent and optimized retrieval precision alone.
